title: INRIM JAWS quantum steps, margins and uncertainty analysis
author: Kubiczek, Krzysztof
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The data collected within the project "Research on possibility of functionality improvement of ac quantum voltage standard" funded by Polish National Science Centre (grant no. 2022/06/X/ST7/00014). The data is associated with articles "Verification of thermal converters by means of a pulsed Josephson standard" (https://doi.org/10.21014/tc4-2023.15) and "Direct calibration of a true-rms ac voltmeter against a He-free pulsed Josephson standard" (https://doi.org/10.1016/j.measurement.2024.114981).
steps_raw: The data collected within the project "Research on possibility of functionality improvement of ac quantum voltage standard" funded by Polish National Science Centre (grant no. 2022/06/X/ST7/00014). The data is associated with articles "Verification of thermal converters by means of a pulsed Josephson standard" (https://doi.org/10.21014/tc4-2023.15) and "Direct calibration of a true-rms ac voltmeter against a He-free pulsed Josephson standard" (https://doi.org/10.1016/j.measurement.2024.114981).
